creator: lantw44@gmail.com
text:
===>   Installing existing package /packages/All/py36-igraph-0.7.0.txz
Installing py36-igraph-0.7.0...
pkg-static: py36-igraph-0.7.0 conflicts with py27-igraph-0.7.0 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/bin/igraph

It seems that it can be easily resolved by adding 'USE_PYTHON=concurrent'.
